_comment: ZERO-MERGE DEPLOY: drop at /etc/claude-code/managed-settings.d/20-team-brain.json on every Podclave VM. Claude Code COMBINES hooks across all settings sources, so this injects the team-brain hooks org-wide WITHOUT touching any user's ~/.claude/settings.json. Re-provisioning overwrites this one owned file -> idempotent. Hooks: UserPromptSubmit=auto-recall (inject relevant knowledge); Stop=async passive capture (debounced distiller); SessionEnd=capture backstop. All guard against BRAIN_DISTILLER recursion.
